title: High Court Bail Docket IN-BAIL-2023-0893
summary: Rana Kapoor, former MD/CEO of YES Bank, allegedly conspired with DHFL promoters to invest ₹3,700 crores of public funds in DHFL debentures in exchange for kickbacks of ₹600 crores laundered through family-owned companies. He is accused of misusing his official position for personal gain, involvin...
